sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9252" key="a)nomoou/sios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνομο-ούσιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n9252.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">differing in</tr_> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ούσία</itype>, Ps-<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inSE</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
